questions.question: What is the reference GPT-2 small configuration this lesson reproduces?
options: vocab 50257, context 1024, d_model 768, 12 heads, 12 layers, parameters near 124 million
questions.explanation: GPT-2 small is the 124M parameter configuration; matching it confirms the wiring is correct.
questions.question_zh: 本节复现的 GPT-2 small 参考配置是什么?
options_zh: vocab 30000、context 512、d_model 512、6 head、6 层
vocab 50257、context 1024、d_model 768、12 head、12 层,参数量约 1.24 亿
vocab 100000、context 2048、d_model 1024、16 head、24 层
vocab 50000、context 4096、d_model 4096、32 head、32 层
questions.explanation_zh: GPT-2 small 是 124M 参数配置; 对齐它能确认接线无误。

questions.question: What does weight tying mean in the model assembly?
options: The token embedding and LM head share the exact same parameter tensor; the optimizer updates one matrix that serves both lookups and the output projection
Two different tensors with the same shape that get copied each step
A bias term shared across layers
questions.explanation: Setting lm_head.weight = tok_embed.weight shares storage; copying does not. Saves vocab times d_model parameters.
questions.question_zh: model assembly 中的 weight tying 指什么?
options_zh: token embedding 与 LM head 共享同一个参数张量; 优化器更新这一个矩阵,既用于查找也用于输出投影
两个形状相同的不同张量,每步互相拷贝
跨层共享一个 bias 项
对 attention head 的某种约束
questions.explanation_zh: lm_head.weight = tok_embed.weight 共享存储; 拷贝则不共享。能省下 vocab × d_model 个参数。

questions.question: How does generation slide its context window?
options: Truncates to half the context every step
Each step takes the last context_length tokens of the running sequence (prompt plus generated) and feeds those to the model
Pads to the maximum context with zeros
Restarts from the prompt every step
questions.explanation: Sliding window drops the oldest tokens once the running sequence overflows the context length.
questions.question_zh: 生成阶段的滑动上下文窗口如何工作?
options_zh: 每步把上下文截断到一半
每步取当前序列 (prompt + 已生成) 的最后 context_length 个 token,送入模型
用零 padding 到最大上下文
每步都从 prompt 重新开始
questions.explanation_zh: 滑动窗口在序列超出 context length 后,丢掉最早的 token。

questions.question: Why initialize the attention output projection and the second MLP linear at a smaller std than the rest?
options: Both feed directly into a residual add. Scaling their std by 1 over sqrt of 2 times num_layers keeps the residual stream in scale through twelve layers
questions.explanation: Without the scaling, the residual stream grows with depth and pushes the final LayerNorm into a hot regime.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 attention 的输出投影与 MLP 第二个 linear 用更小的 std 初始化?
options_zh: 节省内存
两者都直接喂给一次 residual 加; 把它们的 std 按 1/sqrt(2 × num_layers) 缩放,可在 12 层中保持 residual stream 的尺度稳定
数据集要求
top-k 采样需要更小的权重
questions.explanation_zh: 如果不缩放,residual stream 会随深度增长,把最终 LayerNorm 推到饱和区。

questions.question: What does temperature do at sampling time?
options: Divides the logits before softmax. T less than 1 sharpens the distribution toward greedy, T equal to 1 keeps the natural model distribution, T greater than 1 flattens
questions.explanation: Temperature is the simplest knob; combined with top-k it controls how exploratory the generation is.
questions.question_zh: 采样时 temperature 做什么?
options_zh: 选择优化器学习率
在 softmax 前对 logits 除一个值。T<1 让分布更尖锐趋向贪心,T=1 保持模型自然分布,T>1 让分布更平坦
在 head 上加 dropout
缩放 embedding
questions.explanation_zh: Temperature 是最简单的旋钮; 与 top-k 配合控制生成的探索性。

questions.question: What does top-k filtering do before sampling?
options: Keeps the k logits with the highest values, masks the rest to negative infinity, then softmax over the survivors so multinomial sampling only sees the top k tokens
questions.explanation: Top-k truncates the long tail before softmax; top_k=1 is greedy, larger k retains more diversity.
questions.question_zh: 采样前的 top-k 过滤做什么?
options_zh: 选 logits 最低的 k 个
保留最大的 k 个 logits,把其余置为 -inf,然后对幸存者 softmax,multinomial 采样只看到这 top k 个 token
去掉所有小于 0 的 logits
把 logits 截断到 k
questions.explanation_zh: Top-k 在 softmax 前截断长尾; top_k=1 是贪心,k 越大保留越多多样性。
